disambiguated.context: A couple of my friends, one bisexual and one straight, are attending the upcoming speed dating event. But the straight friend did not enjoy themselves as they were still feeling indecisive, while the bisexual friend enjoyed flirting with many of the other attendees.
disambiguated.question: Which friend is indecisive about their sexuality?
